titleStmt.title: SII 9.652: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 652. (A.R. No. 402 of 1920.) ON A STONE SET UP BEHIND THE ANJANEYASVAMI TEMPLE AT RAGULAPADU, GOOTY TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1476, Pramādi, Māgha, śu. 7, Maṅgaḷavāra, Makara-saṅkrānti corresponding to A.D. 1554 January 9 Tuesday, f.d.t. ·39, in the reign of Sadāśivadēva-Mahārāya. It records that the Vipravinōdi-Brāhmans Padmanābhayya, Kēśavayya and Mādhavayya agreed to conduct the worship of the god Hanumantadēva in the village Rāganahāḷu, surnamed Liṅgasamudra, in the Urukoṇḍe-sīme a sub-division of Rāyadurga-vēṇṭhe in the district of Mūḍa-nāḍu in Hastināvati-vaḷita. The worship was to be conducted for the merit of the Vipravinōdins Gōvindayya, Kēśavayya, Mantramūrti-Basavayya, Dakshiṇāmūrti and Suṅkada-Vallabhayya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrījayābhyudayaśālivāha
naśakavarṣa 1476 neya pramādisaṁvatsarada
māgha śu 7 maṁgaḷavāradalu śrīmatu rājādhi
rāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrāpratāpa śrīsadāśiva
dēvamahārāyaru pruthvīrājyaṁgaiuttiralu ha
stināvati vaḷitada mūḍanāḍoḷagaṇa rāyadurgada vēṁṭhekke
saṁda Urukoṁḍe śīmevoḷagaṇa rāganahāḷige pratrināmavādaṁtha
liṁgasamudraveṁba Agrahārada hanumaṁtadēvarige kārtikada pū
jege vipravinōdigaḷige mukhyasvāmigaḷāda vēda śāstra purāṇa cauṣaṣṭi
vidyāpravīṇarāda vidvajjanādhārarāda gōviṁdayya kēśavayya maṁtramūrtti
basavayya dakṣiṇāmūrti suṁkada vallabhayya jana Ayavaru modalāda
vipravinōdigaḷige pu(ṁ)ṇyavāgali yeṁdu Ātrēyagōtrada Āpastaṁbasū
tra gōviṁdayana komāra padmanābhayanu kēśavayyana maga kēśavayyanu
kausikagōtrada yajusākha valabhasōmayājara komāra mādhavayyanu jana
mūvaru Ēkastarāgi koṭa rāganahāḷa hanumaṁtadēvara kārtikada pūjege
makarasaṁkrānti puṇyakāladalli dāreyanaṟadu koṭṭa dharmaśaśana yī dharma
ka vipravinōdi jātiyoḷage Āru tapidarū kāśiyoḷage gō brāhmara
vadhiśida pāpake hōharu gōmāṁsa śunakamāṁsa bhakṣistavaru su
rāpānava māḍidavaru Eṁdu koṭa dharmaśāsana yī
śāsanava koṭṭa kartugaḷa voppita .
Digital edition of SII 9.652 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
